title: 3/4 SLEEVE KNIT PULLOVER (BLUE)
body_html:
This sleeve knit pullover is the kind of effortless layer you will reach for again and again. Designed with a relaxed fit, soft lightweight knit, and subtle dropped shoulders, it drapes beautifully without feeling bulky. The clean neckline and ribbed sleeves add just enough detail while keeping the look simple and wearable. Finished in a fresh light blue tone, this pullover works year round and styles easily with denim, skirts, or tailored trousers for everyday ease.

 

Styling Tip: Wear it loose with straight leg jeans for a relaxed look or front tuck it into a midi skirt for an easy polished outfit.

Styling Tip: Wear it buttoned as a top with matching denim or layer it open over a fitted tank with trousers and sneakers for an easy off duty look.

Oversized pockets and a relaxed fit make it as functional as it is cool, basically, your new “throw it on and go” essential.

 

Style Tip:

Pair it with matching knit bottoms for an easy head-to-toe vibe, or throw it over a slip dress and sneakers for an instant off-duty upgrade. Keep it open with a tank and gold chains when you want that effortless, borrowed-from-the-boys look.

title: ANNALISE SUNGLASSES (LIGHT GREY)
body_html:
Neutral but never boring. The Annalise Rectangle Sunglasses in light grey feature a translucent frame with a sleek squared silhouette that gives off quiet confidence. The vibe is effortless, slightly retro and very “I know my personal style.” Lightweight, easy to wear and made to go with literally everything in your closet from streetwear days to soft minimal looks.

 

Styling Tip: Pair these with a ribbed tank, oversized button-up left open and wide leg trousers. Add chunky sneakers or ballet flats and a structured tote for that clean, city-on-the-go energy.

The tinted lenses keep the look balanced and versatile, making these sunglasses a standout choice for sunny days, vacations, and styled errands. Lightweight and flattering, they are made to elevate simple outfits with a subtle pop of color.
